requirements.text: React experience for product user interfaces
Product-focused full-stack engineering across user interfaces and backend APIs
requirements.source_quote: You will build the user interfaces and backend APIs to implement them for all parts of Teleport.

requirements.text: Ability to work across the full product lifecycle from customer understanding through design, implementation, testing, and documentation
requirements.source_quote: You will work on the full product lifecycle from working with customers to understand their problems, writing RFDs for your proposed design, implementation, testing, and documentation.

requirements.text: Experience writing design proposals or RFD-style technical design documents
requirements.source_quote: writing RFDs for your proposed design

requirements.text: Comfort contributing to open source codebases
requirements.source_quote: Teleport is an open source project and most of the code you will write will be open source

requirements.text: Ability to implement backend work in Go or Rust alongside TypeScript and React
requirements.source_quote: written in Go (or Rust), TypeScript, React

requirements.text: Customer empathy and ability to understand user problems before building
requirements.source_quote: working with customers to understand their problems

requirements.text: Ability to improve product efficiency through server-side pagination and filtering
requirements.source_quote: Making Teleport more efficient by adding server-side pagination and filtering capabilities

requirements.text: Ability to design onboarding and setup experiences that guide users through complex infrastructure workflows
requirements.source_quote: designing experiences that guide the user through the setup and onboarding process

requirements.text: Ability to build interfaces that support passwordless security experiences
requirements.source_quote: Building user interfaces that support our passwordless vision.

requirements.text: Ability to contribute to a desktop app that provides access to Teleport resources
requirements.source_quote: Teleport Connect, a desktop app providing quick access to Teleport resources

requirements.text: Interest in infrastructure identity for humans, machines, workloads, and AI agents
requirements.source_quote: giving every human, machine, workload, and AI agent a cryptographically secured identity

requirements.text: Ability to work in a small, autonomous, collaborative team where product impact is visible
requirements.source_quote: the team is small, and your work shows up directly in the product

responsibilities.text: Build product user interfaces and matching backend APIs across Teleport.
Improve data-heavy Teleport surfaces with server-side pagination and filtering.
Design guided setup, onboarding, and passwordless interfaces for complex infrastructure identity workflows.
Own product lifecycle work from customer problem discovery and RFDs through implementation, testing, and documentation.
Contribute mostly open source code in Go or Rust, TypeScript, and React.

success_outcomes.text: Teleport users can reach infrastructure resources more quickly through efficient, guided product flows.
Security-sensitive identity experiences remain easy to use while supporting Teleport's passwordless direction.
Design proposals, tests, documentation, and open source implementation make product changes maintainable and reviewable.

keyword_signals.reason: Core full-stack responsibility paired with UI work.
Role framing emphasizes product-focused full-stack engineers.
Allowed backend implementation language alongside Go.
Most role code is expected to be open source.
Specific product area for guided setup experiences.
Product vision signal tied to identity and security UX.
Design proposal artifact explicitly named in lifecycle expectations.

screening_priorities.reason: The explicit must-haves combine Go, TypeScript, React, and web security.
screening_priorities.evidence: Go experience; TypeScript and React experience; Strong understanding of web security

screening_priorities.reason: The role is not just implementation; it expects product lifecycle ownership from customer problem to documentation.
screening_priorities.evidence: full product lifecycle from working with customers... writing RFDs... implementation, testing, and documentation

screening_priorities.reason: Teleport's product work is security- and identity-heavy, with passwordless and cryptographic identity as central signals.
screening_priorities.evidence: Building user interfaces that support our passwordless vision

screening_priorities.reason: Open source collaboration and code review are likely important because most role code is open source.
screening_priorities.evidence: most of the code you will write will be open source

candidate_risk_notes.text: The JD is remote-first but does not state eligible countries, work authorization, visa, or sponsorship rules.
Role seniority is not explicitly stated even though compensation suggests a senior-level role.

red_flags.text: No explicit country eligibility, work authorization, visa, or sponsorship terms are provided.
The JD does not state a formal job title beyond describing product-focused full-stack engineers.
red_flags.source_quote: We are looking for product focused full stack engineers
